Description: Search your deck for up to 4 basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Aether Paradise Conservation Area
Description: Basic [G] Pokémon and Basic [L] Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) take 30 less damage from the opponent's attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Brooklet Hill
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for a Basic [W] Pokémon or Basic [F] Pokémon, put it onto their Bench, and shuffle their deck.

Name: Mt. Coronet
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may put 2 [M] Energy cards from their discard pile into their hand.

Name: Shrine of Punishment
Description: Between turns, put 1 damage counter on each Pokémon-GX and Pokémon-EX (both yours and your opponent's).

Name: Tapu Bulu-GX
Effects: You may discard all Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 60 more damage.
Heal all damage from this Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Tapu Fini-GX
Effects: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Discard 2 [W] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Shuffle your opponent's Active Pokémon and all cards attached to it into their deck. If your opponent has no Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Tapu Koko-GX
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may move any number of [L] Energy from your other Pokémon to this Pokémon. If you do, switch this Pokémon with your Active Pokémon.
Effects: This attack does 50 damage times the amount of Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Tapu Lele-GX
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Effects: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
Heal all damage from 2 of your Benched Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
